Hardware Component File

Driver DCM X95 SLOT v4.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference DDCM_X95_4.0_20090204T091037.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 125000
Send ID 705
Receive ID 725
Functional Addr A5
Functional Name DDCM
